title: Working for Families and paid parental leave payments – King’s Birthday
content:
The weekly Working for Families (WfF) and fortnightly paid parental leave (PPL) payments will not be affected by King’s Birthday.
Dates for the WfF weekly and PPL fortnightly payments are Tuesday 2 or Wednesday 3 June. You might see in myIR that the processing dates are showing as different to the dates above. However, this does not change the date the payment is made.
If you need to get in touch with us, please send a message in myIR.
How to send a message in myIR
